description.value:
• Action Cost: [Reaction]
  • Trigger: You see a creature attack an innocent, helpless, or defenseless target
  • Range: 60 feet
  • Effect: Deal Positive damage equal to your Tier × 8 to the attacker. No save - Athore's hammer falls instantly on those who prey upon the weak.
  • Damage Type: Positive (energy), Half DR
  • Usage: Uses 1 Channel Divinity

system.trigger: You see a creature attack an innocent, helpless, or defenseless target
system.effect: Deal Positive damage equal to your Tier × 8 to the attacker. No save - Athore's hammer falls instantly on those who prey upon the weak.
